title: Aanaalum Indha Mayakkam Lyrics 10 Endrathukulla Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Aanaalum Indha Mayakkam
Singer : Sathya Prakash
Lyrics : Mani Amudhavan & Jyothiraj
Music: D Imman

Aanaalum indha mayakkam
Aagadhu nenjey unaku
Ponaalum ninni sirikkum
Pogaadhu indha kirukku

Arugaamayil irupen
Adadaa ena viyapen
Nee sonnaalum
Sollama ninnaalum

Dhinamum nalla sagunam
Pudhusa oru payanam
Indha paadhaayadhu
Oor seranum

Thalaya kodhi naanum paarka
Thanimai ellam thinnu theerka
Vandhaayee oh oh oh...

Aanaalum indha mayakkam
Aagadhu nenjey unaku
Ponaalum ninni sirikkum
Pogaadhu indha kirukku

Sirikum podhey moraipen
Mazhaikul veyyil adipen
Naa ponaalum pogaadha solliten

Mudiyum ena nenacha
Thodarum ena mudipen
Nee maaradha naan maaritten

Nilavu kulla illa neeru
Neeril thoongum nilava paaru
Nammattam....

Aanaalum indha mayakkam
Aagadhu nenjey unaku
Ponaalum ninni sirikkum
Pogaadhu indha kirukku

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Aanaalum Indha Mayakkam from the movie 10 Endrathukulla, a captivating track that showcases the mesmerizing vocals of Sathya Prakash. With lyrics penned by Mani Amuthavan and Jyothiraj, and music composed by D Imman, this song is a perfect blend of rhythm and emotion. Dive into the dynamic world of Tamil cinema with this unforgettable musical masterpiece.
stanzaMeanings: This stanza lists the contributors to the song, including the singer, lyricists, and composer.
However, this intoxication won't leave your heart. Even if it tries to go, it stays and smiles. This madness won't depart.
The world appears beautiful to me, as if it's arranged attractively before me.
I will stay close to you, amazed at your presence. Whether you speak or remain silent, I am captivated.
Every day brings good fortune, a new journey. This path leads to a destination.
I raise my head to look, solitude consumes me. You arrived to end this loneliness.
However, this intoxication won't leave your heart. Even if it tries to go, it stays and smiles. This madness won't depart.
When you smile, I feel a rush. In the rain, I feel the sun's warmth. I told you that even if I leave, I won't truly go.
When I thought it would end, it continued. I changed myself because you didn't change.
There is no water within the moon. Look at the moon sleeping in the water. Our connection...
However, this intoxication won't leave your heart. Even if it tries to go, it stays and smiles. This madness won't depart.
Before she speaks, my heart leaps with joy.
